title: Killing of Masood Masjoody Exposes Deep Rifts in Canada’s Iranian Diaspora
summary_full: An Iranian activist in Vancouver disappeared after accusing two compatriots of wanting him dead. Then his body was found.
summary_public: An Iranian activist in Vancouver disappeared after accusing two compatriots of wanting him dead. Then his body was found.
